_meta.description: 7-criteria scoring survey for determining whether a form should be Online (web portal) or Offline (Excel). Based on core-standards/18-online-vs-offline-form-decision-framework.md. Total > threshold_online = ONLINE; otherwise OFFLINE.

always_online: Data feeds into OEE / OTD dashboard
needs_scoring: Newly created form with no usage history

criteria.label: Frequency
criteria.description: How often is this form filled out?
criteria.description_vi: Form nay duoc dien bao nhieu lan?

criteria.label: Field count & complexity
criteria.description: How many fields and how complex is the form layout?
criteria.description_vi: Bao nhieu truong va bo cuc form phuc tap the nao?

criteria.label: Fill location
criteria.description: Where is the form typically filled out?
criteria.description_vi: Form thuong duoc dien o dau?

options.label: Shop floor / at machine (phone/tablet)
options.label_vi: San san xuat / tai may (dien thoai/tablet)

criteria.label: Real-time dashboard need
criteria.label_vi: Nhu cau dashboard thoi gian thuc
criteria.description: Does the data need to appear on a live dashboard or trigger alerts?
criteria.description_vi: Du lieu co can hien thi tren dashboard truc tiep hoac kich hoat canh bao?

options.label: KPI live feed / escalation trigger
options.label_vi: KPI truc tiep / kich hoat leo thang

options.label: Status tracking / trend chart
options.label_vi: Theo doi trang thai / bieu do xu huong

criteria.label: Approval workflow
criteria.description: Does this form require electronic approval or escalation?
criteria.description_vi: Form nay co can phe duyet dien tu hoac leo thang?

options.label: Multi-step e-signature / approval gate
options.label_vi: Phe duyet nhieu buoc / cong duyet

options.label: Manager notification / single approve
options.label_vi: Thong bao quan ly / duyet don

criteria.label: Attachments
criteria.description: What type of attachments does this form typically require?
criteria.description_vi: Form nay thuong can loai tep dinh kem nao?

options.label: CMM data file / CAM link
options.label_vi: Tep du lieu CMM / lien ket CAM

options.label: Multi-file package (drawings, specs)
options.label_vi: Goi nhieu tep (ban ve, thong so)

criteria.label: Formula / Calculation
criteria.description: Does this form require formulas or complex calculations?
criteria.description_vi: Form nay co can cong thuc hoac tinh toan phuc tap?

options.label: Matrix / VLOOKUP / complex formulas
options.label_vi: Matrix / VLOOKUP / cong thuc phuc tap
